productDisplayName: Baggit Women Samson Lisa Red Wallet
description: Worry no longer about managing money, cards and coins in your tote bag! Organise your everyday essentials into this stylish wallet from baggit. This timeless piece is on the top of our wishlist this year. A sophisticated addition to your accessory collection, you can carry this piece in your hand or pop it into your bag. Dimensions: 10 cm x 19 cm Crafted from leatherette with a metal ring detail on top A buttonable flap Six card holders and a fabric lined compartment with a zippered separator Six card holders and a pocket on the flap side One zippered pocket on the back Care Wipe with clean, damp cloth to remove dirt
